LanguageData.ABY_ResidueSinteringCrucible.label: abyssal residue sintering crucible
LanguageData.ABY_ResidueSinteringCrucible.description: A sealed infernal-industrial crucible used to reclaim unstable sigils, horde fragments and low-grade abyssal stock into inert residue. The forge creates weapons and implants; this machine does the dirty recovery work.
